title: Conversation repair roleplay
subtitle: Recover when you do not understand or said it badly.
duolingoBridge: B1 Output turns B1 knowledge into usable production: speaking, writing, summarizing native-style input, reacting, arguing, and self-correcting.
overview: Knowledge point 1: stay in French during confusion.
Knowledge point 2: repair with clarification and reformulation.

sections.title: Output tools
rows: let us start again from the beginning

items.fr: Attends, je reformule, parce que ma phrase n’était pas claire.
items.en: Wait, I will rephrase, because my sentence was not clear.
items.es: Espera, reformulo, porque mi frase no estaba clara.

items.fr: Je n’ai pas bien compris la dernière partie de ta question.
items.en: I did not understand the last part of your question well.
items.es: No entendí bien la última parte de tu pregunta.

items.fr: Tu veux dire que je dois expliquer mon opinion ou raconter une expérience ?
items.en: Do you mean that I have to explain my opinion or tell an experience?
items.es: ¿Quieres decir que debo explicar mi opinión o contar una experiencia?

items.fr: Ce que je voulais dire, c’est que la méthode doit rester réaliste.
items.en: What I meant is that the method must remain realistic.
items.es: Lo que quería decir es que el método debe seguir siendo realista.

items.fr: On reprend depuis le début, et je vais répondre plus simplement.
items.en: Let us start again from the beginning, and I will answer more simply.
items.es: Volvamos desde el principio, y voy a responder más simplemente.
